string 2: Huh? I changed back to normal?
Huh? How'd you people get here?

A space-time disturbance, huh...? What a pain. Hey,
Homeros, I think they must've come from your world.
The Current's all blocked up. That's probably why Homeros's so sleepy.

Well, I guess we'd better get serious about finding a
solution... What a huge pain.
Sorry, but could we ask you people to leave?

Just think of all this as a bit of bad luck. And, with that
said, goodbye now.

Those three are known as "hosts." They exist in a dimension 
outside the world, one we normally can't perceive.

They were made by the higher being who created the world. 
Their child forms are only so they can interact with us.

This higher being seeks balance in the world. The three hosts 
follow its will, managing the order of things.

It's rare to see them together. The fact we're seeing them
more often suggests we may be facing a crisis.

They've been watching you closely for some time now. They
told me to give you this.

As long as the order of the world is in peril, I'm sure
you'll see them again...
